publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-10-09 18:14:02 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Movie film, film strips, slides, patents, professional journals, and correspondence.
did.abstract: Includes material on animal and poultry societies.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: J. Herbert Bruckner was a professor of poultry science at the Cornell University College of Agriculture, and was chairman of the department from 1940-1965.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes material on animal and poultry societies; professional organizations; faculty, students, and various committees at Cornell University; movie film, film strips, and slides; patents; professional journals; and correspondence.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Jacob Herbert Bruckner papers, #21-31-1326. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Poultry -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences
